channel.title: InYourBones Daily Music News
channel.description: Top 5 daily music stories handpicked by InYourBones

item.title: Tyla Reveals Sophomore Album ‘A*POP’
item.description: 🎉 Pop sensation Tyla drops the mic with 'A*POP' album news! 🎤 Are you ready to dance? 💃 #NewMusicAlert #TylaAPop

item.title: Baltimore Orioles Announce “Turnstile Night” Honoring Hometown Hardcore Heroes
item.description: 🔥 Baltimore Orioles salute hometown hardcore legends with epic "Turnstile Night"! Let's rock the ballpark! 🎸⚾ #BmoreHardcore #TurnstileNight

item.title: horsegiirL Announces Debut Album, Shares New Single
item.description: 🎉 Gallop into the weekend with horsegiirL's debut album announcement and new single drop! 🐎🎶 #NewMusicAlert

item.title: Judas Priest Announce Career-Spanning Greatest Hits Compilation
item.description: 🎸 Rock legends Judas Priest are dropping the ultimate playlist! 🔥 Who's ready to crank up the volume? 🤘 #JudasPriest #GreatestHits

item.title: French psych band SLIFT announce North American tour for upcoming album ‘Fantasia’
item.description: 🚀 French psych rockers SLIFT are taking their electrifying tunes on a North American tour! 🎶 Who's ready to jam out? #SLIFTFantasiaTour

item.title: Andy Serkis’ Animal Farm Is an Abomination: Review
item.description: 🎶 Andy Serkis' Animal Farm adaptation sparks lively debate! Are you ready to dive into this wild musical journey? 🐷🎵 #MusicNews

item.title: Office Dog Announce New Album Prime Corner: Hear “Gold Things”
item.description: 🎶 Woof woof! 🐾 Office Dog is back with a new album 'Prime Corner' and "Gold Things" is paws-itively paw-some! 🌟 #NewMusicAlert #OfficeDogPrimeCorner 🎸

item.title: The Story So Far announce fall tour with The Starting Line & Ultra Q
item.description: 🎸 Pumped for this tour lineup! @thestorysofarca, @TheStartingLine, and Ultra Q hitting the road together 🚐 Let's rock! 🤘 #MusicNews 🎶

item.title: Baauer’s Announces First Album in Six Years, Shares New Single
item.description: 🎉 Baauer is back with a bang! 🚀 Get ready to dance with his new album dropping soon! 🎶💿 #Baauer #NewMusicAlert

item.title: Bob Dylan Adds Even More ‘Rough and Rowdy Ways’ Tour Dates
item.description: Bob Dylan keeps on rockin'! 🎸✨ Check out the new tour dates for 'Rough and Rowdy Ways'! 🎶 #BobDylan #TourDates

item.title: Coachella 2027 Dates Announced
item.description: 🌴🎶 Start planning your festival outfits! Coachella 2027 dates are here. Who's already dreaming of those desert vibes? 🔥 #Coachella2027

item.title: Death Lens – “Waiting To Know” (Feat. Militarie Gun’s Ian Shelton)
item.description: 🎶 Emo legends Death Lens team up with Ian Shelton for a powerful new track! 🔥 #MusicNews #CollaborationGoals 🎸

item.title: Tour news: Jane Remover, Bleachers’ ‘Shadow of the City’ 2026, Beth Orton, Erykah Badu, more
item.description: 🎶✨ Exciting tour lineup alert! Get ready to groove with Jane Remover, Bleachers, Beth Orton, Erykah Badu, and more in 2026! 🎵🔥 #MusicNews

item.title: New Prince Single “With This Tear” Released Ahead of Vault Project: Stream
item.description: 🎵 Dive into the legendary Prince's latest single "With This Tear" and get a sneak peek of his upcoming Vault Project! 💜🎶 #Prince #NewMusicAlert

item.title: Lorde, Geese, Turnstile, and More to Play Form Arcosanti 2026
item.description: 🎶 The lineup for Form Arcosanti 2026 is 🔥 Who else is stoked for Lorde, Geese, Turnstile, and more? Let's dance! 💃🕺 #musicfestivals #livemusic

item.title: Rubber Band Gun – “Frodoboy” (Feat. Star Moles)
item.description: 🚀 Groove into another galaxy with Rubber Band Gun's latest track "Frodoboy" featuring the stellar Star Moles! 🌟🎶 #NewMusicFriday

item.title: Bruce Springsteen Covers The Doors & Flavor Flav Spices Up Patti Smith Jam At American Music Honors
item.description: 🎸 Bruce Springsteen's tribute to The Doors & Flavor Flav's surprise at Patti Smith's jam = pure 🔥 at American Music Honors! 🔊🎶 #MusicLegends #AMH

item.title: All Hail Kacey Musgraves and Her Horse-Riding, George Strait-Covering, New Music Premiering Coachella Set
item.description: Yeehaw! 🤠🎶 Kacey Musgraves stole the show at Coachella with her epic set featuring new tunes and a George Strait cover! #MusicalMagic

item.title: PinkPantheress’ Coachella Set Included Janelle Monáe, Dev Hynes, Zara Larsson: Watch
item.description: 🎤🌟 PinkPantheress brought the ultimate squad to Coachella! Watch the magic unfold with Janelle Monáe, Dev Hynes, and Zara Larsson! ✨🎶 #CoachellaVibes

item.title: Listen to Madonna’s New Song “I Feel So Free”
item.description: 🎶 Feelin' the vibes with Madonna's new bop! Turn up the volume and let the music take you on a journey! 🎵 #Madonna #NewMusicAlert

item.title: Morgan Wallen and Ella Langley Premiere New Duet, ‘I Can’t Love You Anymore’ On Stage
item.description: 🎵 Get ready to swoon! Morgan Wallen and Ella Langley debut new duet 'I Can't Love You Anymore' live! 🎶 #musicnews #duetdebut

item.title: Zayn Hints at Australia Tour: ‘You Might Be Seeing Me Soon’
item.description: Aussie fans, keep those kangaroos close 🇦🇺🦘 Zayn drops hints for Down Under tour vibes! 🎶 #ZaynInAussie #SoonCome

item.title: Olivia Rodrigo Debuts ‘Drop Dead’ Live With Addison Rae at Coachella
item.description: Olivia Rodrigo SLAYS with Addison Rae at Coachella! 🌟🎤 Who else is living for this collab? #OliviaRodrigo #CoachellaVibes

item.title: Talk Talk musicians to reunite to celebrate ‘The Colour Of Spring’ 40th anniversary at one-off London gig
item.description: 🎶 Reunion alert! Talk Talk bandmates coming together for epic ‘The Colour Of Spring’ anniversary bash in London! 🌸 #TalkTalkAnniversary

item.title: Geena Davis Completes Sabrina Carpenter’s Thelma & Louise Tribute at Coachella
item.description: 🎶 Geena Davis steals the show at Coachella! 🌟 Sabrina Carpenter's Thelma & Louise tribute was pure magic. #GirlPower 💃 #CoachellaVibes

item.title: Madonna, Sabrina Carpenter Make Coachella History With Stunning ‘Vogue’ and ‘Like a Prayer’ Duets
item.description: 🎉🔥 Madonna and Sabrina Carpenter SLAY Coachella with iconic 'Vogue' and 'Like a Prayer' performances! Legends unite! 🙌✨ #Coachella #MusicHistory

item.title: Dylan Sprouse Holds Home Intruder at Gun Point
item.description: 🚨 Dylan Sprouse goes full superhero mode, keeping his castle safe! 😱🔫 #CelebrityNews #StaySafe

item.title: Tour news: Aziz Ansari, Murphy’s Law, David Cross, Uranium Club, Loser’s Lounge Plays Duran Duran, more
item.description: 🌟 Exciting tour updates ahead! 🎶 Get ready to rock with these music icons! 🎸 #TourNews #LiveMusicMondays

item.title: Beastie Boys Release To the Five Boroughs Deluxe Reissue
item.description: 🎉 Beastie Boys fans, get ready to groove with the deluxe reissue of To the Five Boroughs! Unleash those iconic beats! 🎶 #BeastieBoys #DeluxeEdition

item.description: 🚀 Beatles reunion alert! 🎸 Paul McCartney teams up with Ringo Starr for new solo album magic! 🌟 #LegendsCollide #MusicHistoryMade

item.description: 🚀🎶 Sigourney Weaver taking the galaxy by storm in The Mandalorian and Grogu? Count us in! Watch the epic trailer now! #SlayingInSpace ✨

item.description: 🎶 Legendary collab alert! Massive Attack teams up with Tom Waits for their first track in 6 years! 🔥 #MusicLegendsUnite 🎤

item.description: Buckle up, music lovers! 🎶 Neko Case is bringing us a Thelma & Louise musical this fall! Who's ready for this ride? 🚗🎤 #NekoCase #ThelmaAndLouiseMusical

item.title: Charli XCX Is Making a Rock Album
item.description: 🎸 Get ready to rock out with @charli_xcx! She's switching things up and we're totally here for it! 🤘 #CharliXCX #RockAlbum

item.description: 🚀 Rock legend Paul Stanley amps up the fun with a thrilling new Avatar Spectacular in Vegas! 🎸✨ #PaulStanley #AvatarSpectacular #VegasShowbiz

item.description: 💃🎶 Bow down to the queen! 👑 Rihanna makes history with 200 million RIAA singles certifications! 🔥 #Rihanna #RecordBreaker

item.description: 🎶 Get ready to hit the dance floor with the Queen of Pop! 💃👑 #Madonna #ConfessionsII #NewMusicAlert

item.description: 🔥 WU LYF is back and ready to rock our worlds! Emotions running high as they awaken from their musical hibernation 🎶 #WULYFReturns

item.description: 🌵 Kacey's taking on the desert vibes at Coachella Weekend 2! Who else is ready for some golden hour music magic? 🎶 #CoachellaBound #KaceyMusgraves
